title: Java Reflection - Finding Getters and Setters of a Class at Runtime
summary: It is possible to detect getters and setters of a Java class at runtime via Java Reflection. There are no direct methods for finding getters and setters built-in to the Java Reflection API, but you can still use it to detect getters and setters. I have updated this tutorial to be a bit more clear about how you do that!
content:
It is possible to detect getters and setters of a Java class at runtime via Java Reflection.
                There are no direct methods for finding getters and setters built-in to the Java Reflection API,
                but you can still use it to detect getters and setters. I have updated this tutorial to be a bit
                more clear about how you do that!
